/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared  -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/serialClient_lib.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libserialClient_lib.so -o libserialClient_lib.so CMakeFiles/serialClient_lib.dir/SerialClient/src/serial_client.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kilabor/isaac-go2-ros2/build/hesai_ros_driver/src/driver/HesaiLidar_SDK_2.0/libhesai: libsource_lib.so libplatutils_lib.so liblog_lib.so
